title: Employee Welfare: Freedom from Discrimination, Harassment, and Retaliation
description: Conroe ISD is committed to providing a workplace free from discrimination, harassment, and retaliation for all district employees. The policy outlines how the district handles complaints from staff members who believe they have been treated unfairly based on characteristics such as race, gender, age, or disability. Community members may find this policy relevant because a respectful and equitable work environment helps support the overall well-being of the schools where their children learn.
